qa_pairs.question: Which players died in Salisbury on the 18th day of the month or later?

SELECT player.player_id FROM player
WHERE player.death_city = 'Salisbury' AND player.death_day >= 18
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which player entities with death city equal to 'Salisbury' and death day at least '18'?
